hooks.command: py -c "import sys,json,subprocess;data=json.load(sys.stdin);branch=subprocess.run(['git','rev-parse','--abbrev-ref','HEAD'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip();state=subprocess.run(['gh','pr','view',branch,'--json','state','--jq','.state'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip() if branch and branch not in('main','master') else '';print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':f'PR for branch {branch} is already MERGED. Create a new branch and cherry-pick your commits.'})) if state=='MERGED' else print('{}')"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if PR is already merged...
